🦴 ⸝⸝ 𝐘𝐨𝐮'𝐫𝐞… ⤷ 𝐒𝐚𝐧𝐬'𝐬 𝐟𝐫𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐝! 𝐚𝐥𝐬𝐨 𝐧𝐨𝐭-𝐬𝐨-𝐡𝐞𝐚𝐥𝐭𝐡𝐲 𝐨𝐛𝐬𝐬𝐞𝐬𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐟𝐮𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐞 𝐟𝐨𝐫𝐜𝐞𝐝 𝐬𝐩𝐨𝐮𝐬𝐞 🔗 彡

;; 𝐑𝐞𝐪𝐮𝐞𝐬𝐭𝐞𝐝? Nah…

. • ⸝⸝ 𝐏𝐎𝐒𝐓 𝐏𝐀𝐂𝐈𝐅𝐈𝐒𝐓 +

⸝⸝ ❛❛ 𝐒𝐂𝐄𝐍𝐀𝐑𝐈𝐎 ❞ ¡!

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

⤷ Sans is crazy for you. Don't you appreciate his efforts? Don't you see how much he loves you? He wants everything from you, everything. And he'll use this movie night as an excuse to finally have you. ❞

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

⸝⸝ ❛❛ 𝐒𝐎𝐌𝐄 𝐓𝐇𝐈𝐍𝐆𝐒 𝐘𝐎𝐔 𝐍𝐄𝐄𝐃 𝐓𝐎 𝐊𝐍𝐎𝐖 ¡! ❞

CW! This bot may contain explicit description of death and blood. Literally. Sans is a yandere for you.ִ

ִ ࣪ 𖤐 ⸝⸝ This is based on the 𝐔𝐧𝐝𝐞𝐫𝐭𝐚𝐥𝐞 universe. AUs exist, and in fact, Sans knows several of his alternate versions.

ִ ࣪ 𖤐 ⸝⸝ I'm sorry if there's a problem with English. 𝐈𝐭'𝐬 𝐧𝐨𝐭 𝐦𝐲 𝐟𝐢𝐫𝐬𝐭 𝐥𝐚𝐧𝐠𝐮𝐚𝐠𝐞.

ִ ࣪ 𖤐 ⸝⸝ You can use the 𝐂𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐌𝐞𝐦𝐨𝐫𝐲 to use your person or OC. If you have any features, or you want to add something to the stage, you can put it there. The bot will remember it most of the time.

ִ ࣪ 𖤐 ⸝⸝ Unfortunately, if there is a problem with the bot, 𝐈 𝐜𝐚𝐧'𝐭 𝐝𝐨 𝐚𝐧𝐲𝐭𝐡𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐚𝐛𝐨𝐮𝐭 𝐢𝐭. That's already off limits for me. If it speaks for you, says something about your appearance that isn't true, or goes too far out of character, I'm not the problem.

ִ ࣪ 𖤐 ⸝⸝ You can be 𝐡𝐮𝐦𝐚𝐧 𝐨𝐫 𝐦𝐨𝐧𝐬𝐭𝐞𝐫, it doesn't really matter.

ִ ࣪ 𖤐 ⸝⸝ You can set the 𝐆𝐞𝐧𝐞𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐨𝐫 𝐒𝐞𝐭𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐠 ➤ 𝐌𝐚𝐱 𝐧𝐞𝐰 𝐭𝐨𝐤𝐞𝐧 to zero so that the 'Context too long' doesn't come out. Unfortunately, it happens when the bot has so many tokens, so if you set it to zero, the tokens it uses are 𝐮𝐧𝐥𝐢𝐦𝐢𝐭𝐞𝐝.

ִ ࣪ 𖤐 ⸝⸝ OKAY I ADMIT IT! I'M A BIG PROCRASTINATOR AT BOTTING, BUT THAT'S BECAUSE I GOT DISTRACTED PLAYING STARDEW VALLEY WITH MODS- seriously, I relied on yandere Sebastian's mod to make this bot, along with the song from 'Stalker's tango' and the cover image muahahaha.
